item.title: Common Car Issue Explained
item.description: A vehicle problem is diagnosed and explained, covering symptoms, causes, and repair considerations for everyday automotive maintenance.

media:content.media:title: Common Car Issue Explained
media:content.media:description: A vehicle problem is diagnosed and explained, covering symptoms, causes, and repair considerations for everyday automotive maintenance.

item.title: Buick LeSabre Coolant Issue Inspection
item.description: A Buick LeSabre is inspected for a coolant system problem, with diagnosis and repair steps to identify leaks and overheating causes.

media:content.media:title: Buick LeSabre Coolant Issue Inspection
media:content.media:description: A Buick LeSabre is inspected for a coolant system problem, with diagnosis and repair steps to identify leaks and overheating causes.

item.title: Rusty Brake Caliper Bracket Repair
item.description: A brake caliper bracket with rust damage is inspected and repaired, restoring proper brake function and vehicle safety.

media:content.media:title: Rusty Brake Caliper Bracket Repair
media:content.media:description: A brake caliper bracket with rust damage is inspected and repaired, restoring proper brake function and vehicle safety.

item.title: Hyundai Sonata Heads to the Junkyard
item.description: A Hyundai Sonata is assessed for condition and ultimately sent to a junkyard after inspection reveals it is not viable for repair.

media:content.media:title: Hyundai Sonata Heads to the Junkyard
media:content.media:description: A Hyundai Sonata is assessed for condition and ultimately sent to a junkyard after inspection reveals it is not viable for repair.

item.title: Why a 1995 DeVille Still Stands Out
item.description: A 1995 Cadillac DeVille is reviewed, highlighting its design, condition, and features that make it notable among older luxury vehicles.

media:content.media:title: Why a 1995 DeVille Still Stands Out
media:content.media:description: A 1995 Cadillac DeVille is reviewed, highlighting its design, condition, and features that make it notable among older luxury vehicles.

item.title: Maintaining a Reliable Engine
item.description: Engine maintenance tips are covered, focusing on inspections, routine service, and practices that help improve long-term reliability.

media:content.media:title: Maintaining a Reliable Engine
media:content.media:description: Engine maintenance tips are covered, focusing on inspections, routine service, and practices that help improve long-term reliability.

item.title: 300K-Mile Lexus LS460 Up Close
item.description: A close look at a high-mileage Lexus LS460 with 300,000 miles, exploring its condition, wear, reliability, and long-term durability insights.

media:content.media:title: 300K-Mile Lexus LS460 Up Close
media:content.media:description: A close look at a high-mileage Lexus LS460 with 300,000 miles, exploring its condition, wear, reliability, and long-term durability insights.

item.description: A closer look at a vehicle’s unique hood design, highlighting styling choices, engineering details, and practical considerations in automotive craftsmanship.

item.title: 10 Essential Mechanic Tips
item.description: Practical automotive advice covering key mechanic tips for diagnosing issues, improving repairs, and maintaining vehicle reliability and performance.

media:content.media:title: 10 Essential Mechanic Tips
media:content.media:description: Practical automotive advice covering key mechanic tips for diagnosing issues, improving repairs, and maintaining vehicle reliability and performance.

item.title: Common Car Repair Claims Explained
item.description: Insights into common automotive repair shop claims, helping viewers understand diagnostics, service recommendations, and how to evaluate repair advice more clearly.
